title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York / Tel Aviv (Global, B2B SaaS)
description: Reporting to the CRO, the Head of Revenue Operations builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. A strategic leader-doer who can own executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, deep Salesforce expertise, and experience scaling GTM operations align perfectly with this Head of Revenue Operations role. The Tel Aviv HQ location and global structure match his location preferences and international experience.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've been following Finout's growth trajectory and your focus on FinOps—a space where RevOps excellence directly drives unit economics. With 15+ years scaling revenue operations in B2B SaaS and hands-on Salesforce expertise through multiple growth phases, I'm familiar with the exact operational backbone challenges you're building out. I'd be interested in exploring how my experience translating CRO strategy into executable dashboards, forecasting models, and cross-functional workflows could accelerate Finout's next growth chapter.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Maintain territory mapping in CRM systems (Fullcast, Salesforce), partner with Sales leadership and Finance to optimize territory composition, and lead special projects like market expansion. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and B2B SaaS background. Territory strategy, pipeline optimization, and data-driven operations are core competencies. Primary consideration: hub location requires clarification on which office and hybrid flexibility.
ai_opener: Omri here—your RevOps Manager role caught my attention given Gong's focus on seller productivity through territory optimization. With 15+ years building GTM infrastructure in B2B SaaS, I've spent considerable time designing scalable territory models and partnering with sales leadership on revenue acceleration strategies. I'd love to explore how my background in pipeline forecasting and Salesforce-driven operations could support Gong's next growth phase.

title: RevOps Manager

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform used by brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As GTM Engineer you'll replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered automations that compound over time. Expect to build lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines that work, activation flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work. You should be able to code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations to make the GTM team dangerously effective during 20x revenue scaling.

Best fit if Omri has technical/automation background; weaker if purely ops-focused.
ai_opener: Conveo's approach to replacing patchwork SaaS with purpose-built AI automations resonates deeply—I've spent 15+ years optimizing GTM stacks and understand the compounding value of attribution pipelines and lead scoring that actually learn. The 20x scaling mandate is exactly where RevOps + automation engineering creates leverage; I'd explore whether my background building self-improving GTM workflows maps to your internal tools roadmap.
